name: mHelpDesk Field Service Management API
what_it_does: mHelpDesk field service management REST API for job scheduling, work order management, invoicing, and customer management for home service businesses. Enables AI agents to manage customer and contact data for service business CRM, handle job scheduling and work order creation for field service operations, access technician dispatch and route management for field operations automation, retrieve estimate and invoice generation for contractor billing workflow, manage payment collection and accounts receivable for service business finance, handle customer communication and appointment reminders for client engagement, access job photo and documentation capture for service verification, retrieve reporting and business analytics for service business intelligence, manage QuickBooks integration for accounting workflow automation, and integrate mHelpDesk with marketing platforms, payment processors, and scheduling tools.
use_cases: Creating work orders from service scheduling agents
Dispatching technicians from field operations agents
Generating invoices from billing automation agents
Sending appointment reminders from customer communication agents
not_for: Enterprise FSM without SMB home service focus
Non-service businesses without work order workflow
best_when: A residential or commercial service contractor (HVAC, plumbing, cleaning, landscaping) wanting AI agents to automate work order management, scheduling, customer communication, invoicing, and QuickBooks integration.
avoid_when: TCPA AUTOMATED COMMUNICATION: Automated appointment reminders and follow-up texts require TCPA prior express written consent; automated SMS without consent creates class action liability. Contractor license compliance — automated job booking and work order creation in licensed trades must verify contractor license status; automated work orders in unlicensed jurisdictions create contractor license violation. Customer data privacy — mHelpDesk contains customer contact and payment information; automated third-party integrations must implement appropriate data handling controls. QuickBooks sync conflicts — automated mHelpDesk-to-QuickBooks sync may create duplicate accounting entries if not configured with correct sync direction; establish clear system-of-record before enabling automated sync.

auth.notes: mHelpDesk uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Sterling, Virginia HQ. Founded 2009. Acquired by HomeAdvisor/Angi (IAC subsidiary) in 2014. Part of Angi/IAC ecosystem. 10,000+ service business customers. HVAC, plumbing, cleaning, and landscaping focus. QuickBooks integration. Competes with Jobber, Housecall Pro, and Workiz for home service FSM.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user monthly subscription
pricing.notes: Sterling, Virginia. HomeAdvisor/Angi (IAC) subsidiary (acquired 2014). Founded 2009. 10,000+ service customers. Angi platform integration.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in API documentation

known_agent_gotchas: TCPA TEXT CONSENT REQUIRED: Automated appointment and follow-up texts require TCPA prior express written consent; no automated SMS without documented consent; mHelpDesk SMS automation creates TCPA class action exposure without consent workflow
No webhooks — job and payment events require polling; no push notification for job status changes or payment completion; implement scheduled polling for event-driven workflows
Angi/HomeAdvisor ecosystem integration — mHelpDesk acquired by Angi creates lead flow integration with HomeAdvisor; automated lead processing must account for Angi platform integration dependencies

QuickBooks sync direction — automated bidirectional QuickBooks sync creates duplicate accounting entries; establish invoice creation as single system-of-record (either mHelpDesk or QuickBooks, not both)
API key exposure in scripts — mHelpDesk API key authentication; ensure keys are not exposed in client-side code or server logs; use environment variables and secrets management
Outdated documentation — mHelpDesk API documentation may not reflect current API behavior; test all automated integrations in sandbox before production deployment
agent_readiness.security_notes: Field service. SOC2. API key. US. Job and customer service data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Field service. SOC2. API key. US. Job and customer data.
